name: Probius
description: A high damage Summoner that must stay near Pylons to be effective.
title: Curious Probe
info: Since his activation, Probius has always wanted to prove himself. He may be small, but he made a big difference by warping in a critical pylon during the retaking of Aiur. As the bravest of probes, Probius is eager to fulfill his purpose in the Nexus.

Probius.name: Disruption Pulse
Probius.description: Fire a burst of energy forward, dealing 142 (+5% per level) damage to all enemies it passes through.  Hitting the center of a Warp Rift will cause it to explode, dealing additional damage.

Probius.name: Warp Rift
Probius.description: Open an unstable Warp Rift at a location that takes 1.25 seconds to arm, which then Slows nearby enemies by 25% lasting 3 seconds.  Armed Warp Rifts explode when they expire or when hit by Disruption Pulse, dealing 261 (+5% per level) damage to nearby enemies.

Probius.name: Photon Cannon
Probius.description: Warp in a Photon Cannon that deals 105 (+4% per level) damage. Lasts for 13 seconds.  While within a Pylon's Power Field, Photon Cannons gain 40% Attack Speed over 4 seconds and reveal nearby enemies.

Probius.name: Pylon Overcharge
Probius.description: For 8 seconds, increase the size of Pylon power fields and allow them to attack enemy Heroes within it for 96 (+4% per level) damage per second. Pylons are Invulnerable for the duration.

Probius.name: Null Gate
Probius.description: Vector Targeting Project a barrier of negative energy in the target direction that lasts 4 seconds. Enemies who touch the barrier take 76 (+4% per level) damage per second and are Slowed by 80% for as long as they remain in contact with it.

Probius.name: Warp In Pylon
Probius.description: Warp in a Pylon that generates a Power Field and grants vision of the surrounding area. Probius only regenerates mana while inside a Power Field. Enemy Heroes and Minions drop Minerals when killed. Gather Minerals to reduce the cooldown of Warp In Pylon by 0.75 seconds.  Up to 2 Pylons can be active at a time.

Probius.name: Worker Rush
Probius.description: Activate to gain an additional 60% Movement Speed for 5 seconds. Taking damage ends this effect early. Worker Rush is always active while at the Hall of Storms.  Passive: Probius moves 10% faster by hovering over the ground.

1.name: Echo Pulse
1.description: Disruption Pulse now returns to Probius 1.25 seconds after reaching its target, dealing 100% damage on the return trip.

1.name: Warp Resonance
1.description: Quest: Hit Heroes with Warp Rift explosions.  Reward: After hitting 8 Heroes with Warp Rift explosions, increase the explosion damage by 120.  Reward: After hitting 16 Heroes with Warp Rift explosions, Warp Rift gains 1 additional charge.

1.name: Gather Minerals
1.description: Quest: Gather Minerals to increase the Health of Photon Cannons by 8, up to 560.  Reward: After collecting 70 Minerals, Photon Cannons deal 35% more damage.

4.name: Photon Barrier
4.description: While a Photon Cannon is alive and powered, Probius gains 40 Spell Armor.

4.name: Turbo Charged
4.description: Worker Rush grants an additional 10% passive Movement Speed while in a Power Field, and its cooldown is reduced by 14 seconds.

4.name: Shield Capacitor
4.description: Probius gains permanent Shields equal to 10% of his max Health. Shields regenerate quickly as long as he hasn't taken damage recently.

7.name: Particle Accelerator
7.description: After hitting 3 Heroes with Disruption Pulse, the next Warp Rift detonated by a Disruption Pulse fires 4 additional pulses that deal 78 (+5% per level) damage from the impact location in different directions.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Disruption Pulse by 0.5 seconds.

7.name: Rift Shock
7.description: Hitting a Warp Rift with Disruption Pulse within 1 second of it arming deals 105 (+5% per level) damage over 3 seconds.

7.name: Tower Defense
7.description: Reduce Photon Cannon's cooldown by 3.5 seconds when Disruption Pulse or Warp Rift damages an enemy Hero.

10.name: Pylon Overcharge
10.description: For 8 seconds, increase the size of Pylon power fields and allow them to attack enemy Heroes within it for 96 (+4% per level) damage per second. Pylons are Invulnerable for the duration.

10.name: Null Gate
10.description: Vector Targeting Project a barrier of negative energy in the target direction that lasts 4 seconds. Enemies who touch the barrier take 76 (+4% per level) damage per second and are Slowed by 80% for as long as they remain in contact with it.

13.name: Aggressive Matrix
13.description: Pylon's Power Field grants allied Heroes 35% increased Attack Damage.

13.name: Power Overflowing
13.description: Pylon's Power Field grants allied Heroes 10% increased Spell Power and 2 Mana per second.

13.name: Shield Battery
13.description: Pylon's Power Field grants allied Heroes 28 (+4% per level) Shields per second, up to 112 (+4% per level). Shields persist for 2 seconds after exiting a Pylon Power Field.

16.name: Quantum Entanglement
16.description: Enemies continue to be Slowed for 3 seconds after their last contact with a Warp Rift.

16.name: Gravity Well
16.description: Enemies are Slowed more the closer they are to the center of the Warp Rift, up to a maximum slow of 60%.

16.name: Interference
16.description: Enemy Heroes hit by Warp Rift explosions have their Spell Power reduced by 35% for 5 seconds. Additionally, enemies hit by Warp Rift explosions are knocked away from the center.

20.name: Construct Additional Pylons
20.description: Probius can now have up to 3 active Pylons, and increase the damage of Pylon Overcharge by 25%.

20.name: Gate Keeper
20.description: Null Gate lasts indefinitely if either end is within a Power Field.

20.name: Shoot 'Em Up
20.description: Enemy Heroes hit by Disruption Pulse take a bonus 2.5% of their maximum Health as damage.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Disruption Pulse by 0.5 seconds.

20.name: Probius Loop
20.description: Whenever a Rift explosion hits 1 or more enemy Heroes, create a new Warp Rift in the same location.

tooltipMarkup.ProbiusConstructAdditionalPylonsPylonOve: Probius can now have up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> active Pylons, and increase the damage of Pylon Overcharge by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ProbiusPylonOverchargeConstructAdditionalPylonsWeaponDamage,AttributeFactor[Heroic] * 100"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.ProbiusDisruptionPulse: Fire a burst of energy forward, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ProbiusDisruptionPulseDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to all enemies it passes through.<n/><n/>Hitting the center of a Warp Rift will cause it to explode, dealing additional damage.
tooltipMarkup.ProbiusEchoPulseDisruptionPulseTalent: Disruption Pulse now returns to Probius <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ProbiusDisruptionPulseEchoPulseReturnPersistent,ExpireDelay" precision="2"/></c> seconds after reaching its target, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> damage on the return trip.
tooltipMarkup.ProbiusGateKeeperNullGateTalent: Null Gate lasts indefinitely if either end is within a Power Field.
tooltipMarkup.ProbiusGatherMineralsPhotonCannonQuestTa: Quest: Gather Minerals to increase the Health of Photon Cannons by , up to . Reward: After collecting Minerals, Photon Cannons deal % more damage.
tooltipMarkup.ProbiusGravityWellWarpRiftTalent: Enemies are Slowed more the closer they are to the center of the Warp Rift, up to a maximum slow of <c val="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.ProbiusInterferenceWarpRiftTalent: Enemy Heroes hit by Warp Rift explosions have their Spell Power reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ProbiusWarpRiftInterferenceDebuff,Duration"/></c> seconds. Additionally, enemies hit by Warp Rift explosions are knocked away from the center.
tooltipMarkup.ProbiusNullGate: <c val="#TooltipNumbers">Vector Targeting</c></n>Project a barrier of negative energy in the target direction that lasts <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(Effect,ProbiusNullGateInitialPersistent,PeriodCount/2) * Effect,ProbiusNullGateInitialPersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]"/></c> seconds. Enemies who touch the barrier take <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ProbiusNullGateDamage,Amount * (1 / Effect,ProbiusNullGateInitialPersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0])"/></c> damage per second and are Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ProbiusNullGateSlowBehavior,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor * (-100)"/>%</c> for as long as they remain in contact with it.
tooltipMarkup.ProbiusParticleAcceleratorDisruptionPuls: After hitting <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Validator,ProbiusCasterHasDisruptionPulseParticleAccelerator3Tokens,Value"/></c> Heroes with Disruption Pulse, the next Warp Rift detonated by a Disruption Pulse fires <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ProbiusDisruptionPulseShootEmUpCreatePersistent,PeriodCount"/></c> additional pulses that deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ProbiusDisruptionPulseParticleAcceleratorDamage,Amount"/></c> damage from the impact location in different directions.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Reduce the cooldown of Disruption Pulse by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,ProbiusDisruptionPulseParticleAcceleratorHitWarpRiftCooldownReduction,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ProbiusPhotonBarrierPhotonCannonTalent: While a Photon Cannon is alive and powered, Probius gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ProbiusPhotonCannonPhotonBarrierSpellShield,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"/></c> Spell Armor.
tooltipMarkup.ProbiusPhotonCannon: Warp in a Photon Cannon that deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ProbiusPhotonCannonWeaponDamage,Amount"/></c> damage. Lasts for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ProbiusPhotonCannonTimedLifeBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>While within a Pylon's Power Field, Photon Cannons gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,ProbiusPhotonCannonAttackSpeedBuff,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor*Behavior,ProbiusPhotonCannonAttackSpeedBuff,MaxStackCount"/>%</c> Attack Speed over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ProbiusWarpRiftTimedLifeBehavior,Period*Behavior,ProbiusPhotonCannonAttackSpeedBuff,MaxStackCount"/></c> seconds and reveal nearby enemies.
tooltipMarkup.ProbiusPowerOverflowingWarpInPylonTalent: Pylon's Power Field grants allied Heroes<c val="#TooltipNumbers"> <d ref="Behavior,ProbiusWarpInPylonPowerOverflowingAbilityPowerBuff,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Ability] * 100"/>%</c> increased Spell Power and <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ProbiusWarpInPylonPowerOverflowingCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate * (1/ Behavior,ProbiusWarpInPylonNearbyAlliesSearchController,Period)" precision="1"/></c> Mana per second.
tooltipMarkup.ProbiusProbiusLoopWarpRiftTalent: Whenever a Rift explosion hits <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ProbiusWarpRiftProbiusLoopSearch,MinCount"/></c> or more enemy Heroes, create a new Warp Rift in the same location.
tooltipMarkup.ProbiusPylonAggressiveMatrixWarpInPylonT: Pylon's Power Field grants allied Heroes <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ProbiusWarpInPylonAggressiveMatrixAttackDamageBuff,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Basic] * 100"/>%</c> increased Attack Damage.
tooltipMarkup.ProbiusPylonOvercharge: For <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ProbiusPylonOverchargeWeaponBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds, increase the size of Pylon power fields and allow them to attack enemy Heroes within it for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ProbiusPylonOverchargeWeaponDamage,Amount * (1/Weapon,ProbiusPylonOverchargeAttackHeroicWeapon,Period)"/></c> damage per second. Pylons are Invulnerable for the duration.
tooltipMarkup.ProbiusQuantumEntanglementWarpRiftTalent: Enemies continue to be Slowed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ProbiusWarpRiftQuantumEntanglementSlow,Duration" precision="1" player="0"/></c> seconds after their last contact with a Warp Rift.
tooltipMarkup.ProbiusRiftShockWarpRiftTalent: Hitting a Warp Rift with Disruption Pulse within <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ProbiusWarpRiftRiftShockTimerBehavior,Duration"/></c> second of it arming deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ProbiusWarpRiftRiftShockDamage,Amount*Behavior,ProbiusWarpRiftRiftShockDoT,PeriodCount"/></c> damage over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ProbiusWarpRiftRiftShockDoT,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ProbiusShieldBatteryWarpInPylonTalent: Pylon's Power Field grants allied Heroes <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ProbiusWarpInPylonShieldBatteryShieldBehavior,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit * (1/Behavior,ProbiusWarpInPylonNearbyAlliesSearchController,Period)"/></c> Shields per second, up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ProbiusWarpInPylonShieldBatteryShieldBehavior,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit * Behavior,ProbiusWarpInPylonShieldBatteryShieldBehavior,MaxStackCount"/></c>. Shields persist for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ProbiusWarpInPylonShieldBatteryShieldBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds after exiting a Pylon Power Field.
tooltipMarkup.ProbiusShieldCapacitorTalent: Probius gains permanent Shields equal to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(Behavior,ProbiusShieldCapacitorPassiveShieldBuff,Modification.VitalMaxArray[Shields] / Unit,HeroProbius,LifeMax) * 100"/>% </c>of his max Health. Shields regenerate quickly as long as he hasn't taken damage recently.
tooltipMarkup.ProbiusShootEmUpDisruptionPulseTalent: Enemy Heroes hit by Disruption Pulse take a bonus <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,ProbiusDisruptionPulseShootEmUpDamage,VitalFractionMax[Life]" precision="2"/>%</c> of their maximum Health as damage.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Reduce the cooldown of Disruption Pulse by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,ProbiusDisruptionPulseParticleAcceleratorHitWarpRiftCooldownReduction,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ProbiusTowerDefensePhotonCannonTalent: Reduce Photon Cannon's cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ProbiusPhotonCannonTowerDefenseReduceCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse * (-1)" precision="2"/></c> seconds when Disruption Pulse or Warp Rift damages an enemy Hero.
tooltipMarkup.ProbiusTurboChargedWorkerRushTalent: Worker Rush grants an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ProbiusWorkerRushTurboChargedPassive,Modification.MoveSpeedBonus / Unit,HeroProbius,Speed * 100"/>%</c> passive Movement Speed while in a Power Field, and its cooldown is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,ProbiusTurboChargedWorkerRush,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value * (-1)"/> </c>seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ProbiusWarpInPylon: Warp in a Pylon that generates a Power Field and grants vision of the surrounding area. Probius only regenerates mana while inside a Power Field. Enemy Heroes and Minions drop Minerals when killed. Gather Minerals to reduce the cooldown of Warp In Pylon by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-1*Effect,ProbiusWarpInPylonReduceCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse" precision="2"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>Up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2 </c>Pylons can be active at a time.
tooltipMarkup.ProbiusWarpRift: Open an unstable Warp Rift at a location that takes <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ProbiusWarpRiftBuildInProgressBehavior,Duration" precision="2"/> </c>seconds to arm, which then Slows nearby enemies by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ProbiusWarpRiftSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor * (-100)"/>%</c> lasting <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ProbiusWarpRiftTimedLifeBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>Armed Warp Rifts explode when they expire or when hit by Disruption Pulse, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ProbiusWarpRiftDetonationDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to nearby enemies.
tooltipMarkup.ProbiusWarpRiftWarpResonanceQuestTalent: Quest: Hit Heroes with Warp Rift explosions.Reward: After hitting Heroes with Warp Rift explosions, increase the explosion damage by .Reward: After hitting Heroes with Warp Rift explosions, Warp Rift gains 1 additional charge.
tooltipMarkup.ProbiusWorkerRush: Activate to gain an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(Behavior,ProbiusWorkerRushMoveSpeed,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor)*100"/>%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ProbiusWorkerRushMoveSpeed,Duration"/></c> seconds. Taking damage ends this effect early. Worker Rush is always active while at the Hall of Storms.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>Probius moves <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ProbiusWorkerRushPassive,Modification.MoveSpeedBonus / Unit,HeroProbius,Speed * 100"/>%</c> faster by hovering over the ground.
